victim.intro: Tap SOS to alert responders. Press again while your request is open to escalate priority. Voice mode listens for help words in your language.
victim.cardManualDesc: Broadcasts your GPS to all teams. Each extra press while help is pending raises priority to critical.
victim.cardVoiceDesc: Hands-free. Say help, SOS, or local equivalents — we detect them automatically.
victim.escalated: Signal escalated — responders see you as critical priority.
victim.micTitleListen: Listening… say HELP, SOS, DANGER or local equivalents
victim.voiceSent: Voice SOS sent for "{{msg}}". Rangers notified!
victim.voiceFailed: Voice SOS failed — try manual button
victim.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Enable in browser settings.

ngo.emptyMine: No SOS is assigned to your team yet. Open “All victims” to see the network.
ngo.readOnlyHint: Another team’s case — situational awareness only.
ngo.readOnlyActions: You cannot change status for cases assigned to another NGO. The system auto-assigns new SOS to the least busy approved team.
ngo.passBusy: I'm busy — assign to another team
ngo.passBusyConfirm: Release this case so another NGO can take it? You will no longer be assigned.
ngo.legendMyCase: Assigned to you (same dot, purple ring)
ngo.mapSharedLocation: {{count}} organizations share this exact map location.
ngo.mapBaseHint: Approved NGO · not a distress signal
ngo.baseLocationDesc: Save a GPS point as your team base. Victims who are assigned to you can see these coordinates.
ngo.saveBaseGps: Save current GPS as my base
ngo.baseSavedHint: Base location saved. It appears as a blue square on the map.
ngo.enableGpsBase: Enable location permission to set your base.
ngo.mapNoBasesYet: No responder bases on the map yet. Tap “Save current GPS as my base” so your organisation appears as a 🏠 house with its name.
